filtered_articles.title: Project Hail Mary Is Now Streaming on MGM+, Which Is Basically Free Through Prime Video
filtered_articles.description: Project Hail Mary is now streaming on MGM+, which is less than $1 if you try out the service through Prime Video.

filtered_articles.title: GTA 6 Cover Art and Pre-Order Reveal Comes With a Fresh Look at Vice City
filtered_articles.description: Rockstar didn’t just reveal the GTA 6 cover art and the date pre-orders go live, it also added a new image to its official website offering a fresh look at Vice City.

filtered_articles.title: GTA 6 Cover Artwork Revealed, Pre-Orders Begin June 25
filtered_articles.description: Rockstar has just revealed the cover artwork for GTA 6, and announced that pre-orders will begin on June 25.
